description_long: This bungalow features a single-story structure with a prominent gable roof covered in green corrugated material. The front facade includes a brick wall section and a wooden porch with latticework, providing a welcoming entryway. Large windows span the front, allowing ample natural light into the living space, while the side and rear walls are primarily brick with minimal window openings. The porch is partially enclosed with wooden posts and railings, and the roof overhangs provide shade and protection from the elements. The building sits on a flat, rectangular base, suggesting a foundation or yard area. The overall design is simple yet functional, with a blend of brick and wood materials typical of suburban or rural bungalows.
description: A single-story bungalow with a green gable roof, brick and wood exterior, and a front porch with latticework and large windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the brick wall, large windows, and the wooden porch with latticework.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable roof, porch entry, and decorative wooden trim under the roof peak.
description_view_2: Rear view with mostly brick wall, minimal windows, and the continuation of the green roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid brick wall and the gable roof structure.
